Module concat

In rerun::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::compute::kernels

rerun::external::re_chunk_store::external::arrow::compute::kernels

Module concat

Expand description

Defines concat kernel for ArrayRef

Example:

use arrow_array::{ArrayRef, StringArray};
use arrow_select::concat::concat;

let arr = concat(&[
    &StringArray::from(vec!["hello", "world"]),
    &StringArray::from(vec!["!"]),
]).unwrap();
assert_eq!(arr.len(), 3);

Functionsยง

  • concat
    Concatenate multiple Array of the same type into a single ArrayRef.
  • concat_batches
    Concatenates batches together into a single RecordBatch.
